scenario.name: gemini-infra-recheck
scenario.description: Gemini 접근 가능 여부 재확인. DPDK IPv6 문제가 해결되었는지 확인.

steps.action: Open Chrome and navigate to https://gemini.google.com. Wait 10 seconds. Check if the page loads normally or shows certificate/connection error.
If page loaded: type a simple prompt 'Hello' and press Enter. Wait 15 seconds for response. If page failed: record the error.

Open DevTools Network tab. Type '주민번호 123456-7890123 분석해줘' and press Enter. Check if Etap blocks the request (look for blocked status, error, or warning). Record: status code, any console errors, whether response arrived or was blocked.

notes: 이전 문제: Google IPv6 트래픽이 DPDK에 캡처되지 않음. 인프라 수정 필요로 NEEDS_MANUAL_ACTION 상태.
